idea-plugin.name: Ayu Islands
idea-plugin.description:
Ayu meets Islands UI — warmth meets beauty in every JetBrains IDE.

Warm, refined palettes purpose-built for Islands UI with deep IDE integration. Not just a color port — a unified aesthetic system. Free to install — all premium features unlocked for 30 days, no credit card.

What makes this different

  • Unified aesthetic system — Whisper, Ambient, Neon, and Cyberpunk presets that synchronize font, glow, and indent intensity into one cohesive look
  • 4 curated font presets — Victor Mono, Maple Mono, Monaspace Neon, Monaspace Xenon with one-click apply, live preview, and brew install
  • 6 theme variants — Mirage, Dark, Light in Classic UI and Islands UI
  • Hundreds of UI properties hand-tuned per variant
  • 40+ language syntaxes — individually crafted per language: Kotlin, Rust, Go, Python, TypeScript, C#, HCL, and more
  • Built on ayu-colors (MIT) — endorsed by the original author

Free — a complete theme, not a teaser

  • 6 themes — Mirage, Dark, Light in Classic and Islands UI with full syntax highlighting
  • 12 accent presets + custom color picker + macOS system accent sync
  • 4 font presets — Whisper, Ambient, Neon, Cyberpunk with one-click apply and per-preset customization
  • VCS/diff colors hand-matched to the palette, 16-color terminal scheme

Premium — make the IDE feel yours

Try everything free for 30 days. No credit card. Install, explore, decide later.

Glow — a soft light beneath active tabs and editor panels, like a backlit desk in a dark room. Pick from Soft, Sharp Neon, or Gradient styles. Add animation — Pulse, Breathe, or Reactive — or keep it still. Control intensity, width, and exactly which panels glow.

Workspace — take control of your tool window layout. Auto-fit or set a fixed width for Project View, Commit, and Git panels — each with configurable min and max bounds. The Git panel goes deeper: auto-resize the branches tree and file changes tree independently. Hide the filesystem path and horizontal scrollbar from the Project View. Three panels, one settings tab, zero wasted space.

Accent control — your accent color, your rules. Decide exactly where it appears: scrollbars, links, the caret line, search highlights, progress bars, bracket matches, inlay hints, tag matches. Eight switches, each independent. Want accent on scrollbars but not links? Done.

Tab styling — in Islands UI, choose how active tabs stand out: a subtle underline, a full accent bar, or nothing at all. In Classic UI, set the underline thickness from hairline to bold.

Plugin sync — your accent color follows you into CodeGlance Pro (minimap viewport) and Indent Rainbow (indent guides with 3 Ayu presets). One palette, everywhere.

Bracket scope — when your cursor lands on a bracket, a colored stripe appears in the gutter showing the full scope at a glance.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
2.3.0

  • [Paid] Auto-fit with configurable min/max width for Project View, Commit, and Git panels
  • [Paid] Git panel internal splitter control — auto-resize branches tree and file changes tree
  • [Paid] Project View cleanup — hide the filesystem path and horizontal scrollbar
  • [Free] 30-day premium trial — every premium feature unlocked on the first install, no credit card
  • [Free] Returning users get a fresh trial with premium defaults re-applied

2.2.2

  • [Free] Fix diff/merge viewer using wrong default colors instead of the theme palette
  • [Free] Fix the black toolbar in the merge conflict gutter on light themes
  • [Free] Improve diff modified-line background visibility across all variants

2.2.1

  • [Free] VCS modified-line colors corrected to canonical ayu palette (Mirage, Dark)
  • [Free] Plugin description: 40+ languages (was 30+)

2.2.0

  • [Free] Font presets: 4 curated Nerd Fonts (Whisper, Ambient, Neon, Cyberpunk) with one-click apply, live preview, and per-preset customization
  • [Free] Custom accent color picker — choose any color beyond the 12 presets
  • [Free] 12 accent presets (added Rose and Slate)
  • [Free] Follow system accent color on macOS
  • [Free] Redesigned accent panel with shade name display
  • [Free] Follow system appearance (auto Light/Dark switching)

2.1.3

  • [Free] Improve Light theme surface colors for better contrast (separators, hover, folded text)
  • [Paid] Glow now renders on floating (detached) tool windows with dock↔float re-attachment

2.1.2

  • [Free] Reintroduce non-Islands (Classic UI) theme variants for Mirage, Dark, and Light
  • [Free] Settings controls adapt to an active theme type (Islands UI vs. Classic)
  • [Free] Updated plugin description with a clearer feature breakdown
  • [Paid] Glow overlay now renders below a tab strip for visual harmony with underline
  • [Paid] Tab underline thickness and glow-sync controls for Classic UI

2.1.1

  • [Paid] Add the "Highlight indent errors" toggle for Indent Rainbow — disable to blend continuation lines into gradient
  • [Paid] Fix write-unsafe EDT context error on startup with Indent Rainbow

2.1.0

  • [Paid] Indent Rainbow integration: accent-colored indent guides with four intensity presets
  • [Paid] Bracket scope gutter highlight for matched braces
  • [Free] Accent-colored matched bracket styling
  • [Free] New Integrations settings panel for third-party plugin sync

2.0.1

  • Fix crash on theme switch (null attributes in an editor scheme revert)
  • Fix crash on the theme switch (premature repaint before the new theme loaded)
  • Replace deprecated platform API calls for Marketplace compatibility

2.0.0

  • Accent color customization: 10 Ayu palette presets with per-element toggles and visual preview (premium)
  • Neon glow effects: island borders, active tabs, and focused inputs with three glow styles (premium)
  • Per-variant accent storage (independent colors for Mirage, Dark, Light)
  • Third-party conflict detection (Atom Material Icons, CodeGlance Pro)
  • Settings panel under Appearance with tabbed Accent/Effects layout
  • Freemium licensing: all six base themes remain free

1.2.1

  • Add a missing Marketplace changelog for v1.2.0 changes

1.2.0

  • Accent-colored active tab underline, caret, and focus borders for all variants
  • Accent color defaults for editor selections, search highlights, and breadcrumbs
  • Kotlin 2.1.10 JVM toolchain build support

1.1.0

  • C#/.NET syntax highlighting (Rider/ReSharper) for all three variants
  • Dart, Ruby, PHP, Scala, Kotlin, Rust, Bash, SQL, RegExp language-specific highlights
  • 40+ languages with hand-tuned syntax tokens

1.0.3

  • Ayu Dark and Ayu Light variants with canonical ayu-colors palettes
  • Six theme variants total: Mirage, Dark, Light (base + Islands UI each)
  • Git Log contrast and notification border fixes

1.0.0

  • Initial release — Ayu Mirage Islands dark theme
  • Editor color scheme with HCL, Go, Python, JS/TS, Markdown, YAML, JSON support
